subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from God, the All-Preserving, the Self-Subsisting, unto them that have believed in God, the Mighty, the Well-Beloved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من الله المهیمن القیوم الی الذینهم آمنوا بالله العزیز المحبوب و فیه یذکر
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment
